prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电 子信息/通信等专业2024年均为"高热推荐"，计算机类为"推荐"，相关工科专业热度持续走高，推高报考竞争；湖北省物理类考生2021年约14.7万人增至2025年约25.0万人，2026 年估算约25.1万人，考生规模持续扩大，竞争加剧；省控线2025年（426分）较2024年（437分）下降，反映试卷难度或整体分数结构变化；河北工业大学主校区 位于天津市（非河北省），在湖北省招生人数较少（2025年物理类49人），属于跨省招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势（2024年异常后移后 2025年大幅回弹）、2026年招生计划持平、湖北省物理类考生规模持续扩大、电气等王牌专业社会热度高企等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低 位次约26189名，区间25689–26689名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17580, 18293, 17131, 29462, and 25989 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant drop in ranking (29462), followed by a notable rebound in 2025 to 25989, indicating large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 25989. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 53 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 49 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 49, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment without additional competitive impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 107th on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings between 103 and 109 in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. From 2021 to 2026, no significant public opinion incidents were detected in reputation monitoring, indicating a stable reputation. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with below-average attention on short video platforms, not creating a boost in application popularity. Although no A- or above disciplines are recorded in the fifth round of evaluation, disciplines such as Electrical Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering are strong (B+ level). Among them, the Electrical Engineering and Automation major has a 'highly recommended' social popularity, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication were all 'highly recommended' in 2024, while Computer Science was 'recommended'. Related engineering majors continue to see rising popularity, increasing application competition. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province increased from approximately 147,000 in 2021 to about 250,000 in 2025, with an estimated 251,000 in 2026, indicating continuous expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition. The provincial control line dropped from 437 in 2024 to 426 in 2025, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or overall score structure. The main campus of Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin (not Hebei Province), with a small enrollment in Hubei (49 Physics Category students in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuation trend of historical rankings (significant rebound in 2025 after an abnormal drop in 2024), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the continuous expansion of Physics Category candidates in Hubei Province, and the high social popularity of flagship majors like Electrical Engineering, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with a minor backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 26189, with a range of 25689 to 26689.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 25689–26689, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical, Measurement and Control, Optoelectronics, Mathematics/Statistics, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Communication, Artificial Intelligence) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Civil, Materials, Chemical, etc.) as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<25689), prioritize reaching for the flagship Tier 1 major Electrical Engineering and Automation; if the ranking is near the upper bound (>26689), focus on Tier 3 safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4361, 4716, 4731, 5332, and 5034 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend, reaching the highest ranking of 5332 in 2024, then slightly rebounding to 5034 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 673 positions over the past 5 years. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei Province was 7 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 3 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 3, unchanged from 2025. The significant reduction in 2025 (from 6 to 3) has stabilized, and the effect of the enrollment reduction has already been reflected in the 2025 ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Hebei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 107th on the Soft Science main list. It is known for engineering, with few History Category majors (only Chinese International Education, French, and Japanese), which are not its traditional strengths. The university's reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average, and attention to History Category related majors is low. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (electrical, mechanical, chemical, etc.), and the History Category majors (Chinese International Education, French, Japanese) lack corresponding A-class discipline support, limiting their academic appeal.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] The social popularity of foreign language majors is "generally wait-and-see," while Chinese language/Chinese majors are "recommended" (advantageous for civil service exams). The number of History Category examinees in Hubei Province decreased from approximately 149,000 in 2021 to about 124,000 in 2024, rebounded to about 141,000 in 2025, and is estimated at about 142,000 in 2026, with the examinee scale basically stable. The provincial control line increased in 2025 (442 points) compared to 2024 (432 points), reflecting slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend (overall backward shift), the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 (3 students), the basically stable scale of History Category examinees, and the average popularity of foreign language majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 5034. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5084, with a range of 4584 to 5584.
